members.name: GetCharacterBounds
members.summary: Returns the bounding rectangle of the character at position [param pos] in the label's local coordinate system. If the character is a non-visual character or [param pos] is outside the valid range, an empty [Rect2] is returned. If the character is a part of a composite grapheme, the bounding rectangle of the whole grapheme is returned.

members.name: GetLineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of lines of text the Label has.

members.name: GetLineHeight
members.summary: Returns the height of the line [param line]. If [param line] is set to [code]-1[/code], returns the biggest line height. If there are no lines, returns font size in pixels.

members.name: GetTotalCharacterCount
members.summary: Returns the total number of printable characters in the text (excluding spaces and newlines).

members.name: GetVisibleLineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of lines shown. Useful if the [Label]'s height cannot currently display all lines.

members.name: AutowrapMode
members.summary: If set to something other than [constant TextServer.AUTOWRAP_OFF], the text gets wrapped inside the node's bounding rectangle. If you resize the node, it will change its height automatically to show all the text. [b]Note:[/b] Labels with autowrapping enabled must have a custom maximum width configured to work correctly, either through the Label's own [member Control.custom_maximum_size] or as a result of a propagated maximum size from a parent Control with [member Control.propagate_maximum_size] enabled.

members.name: AutowrapTrimFlags
members.summary: Autowrap space trimming flags. See [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_START_EDGE_SPACES] and [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_END_EDGE_SPACES] for more info.

members.name: ClipText
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the Label only shows the text that fits inside its bounding rectangle and will clip text horizontally.

members.name: EllipsisChar
members.summary: Ellipsis character used for text clipping.

members.name: HorizontalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's horizontal alignment. Supports left, center, right, and fill (also known as justify).

members.name: JustificationFlags
members.summary: Line fill alignment rules.

members.name: LabelSettings
members.summary: A [LabelSettings] resource that can be shared between multiple [Label] nodes. Takes priority over theme properties.

members.name: Language
members.summary: Language code used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If left empty, the current locale is used instead.

members.name: LinesSkipped
members.summary: The number of the lines ignored and not displayed from the start of the [member text] value.

members.name: MaxLinesVisible
members.summary: Limits the lines of text the node shows on screen.

members.name: ParagraphSeparator
members.summary: String used as a paragraph separator. Each paragraph is processed independently, in its own BiDi context.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override.

members.name: TabStops
members.summary: Aligns text to the given tab-stops.

members.name: Text
members.summary: The text to display on screen.

members.name: TextDirection
members.summary: Base text writing direction.

members.name: TextOverrunBehavior
members.summary: The clipping behavior when the text exceeds the node's bounding rectangle.

members.name: Uppercase
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all the text displays as UPPERCASE.

members.name: VerticalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's vertical alignment. Supports top, center, bottom, and fill.

members.name: VisibleCharacters
members.summary: The number of characters to display. If set to [code]-1[/code], all characters are displayed. This can be useful when animating the text appearing in a dialog box. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property updates [member visible_ratio] accordingly. [b]Note:[/b] Characters are counted as Unicode codepoints. A single visible grapheme may contain multiple codepoints (e.g. certain emoji use three codepoints). A single codepoint may contain two UTF-16 characters, which are used in C# strings.

members.name: VisibleCharactersBehavior
members.summary: The clipping behavior when [member visible_characters] or [member visible_ratio] is set.

members.name: VisibleRatio
members.summary: The fraction of characters to display, relative to the total number of characters (see [method get_total_character_count]). If set to [code]1.0[/code], all characters are displayed. If set to [code]0.5[/code], only half of the characters will be displayed. This can be useful when animating the text appearing in a dialog box. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property updates [member visible_characters] accordingly.
